name: Weather Agent
description: A Kubernetes-deployed weather agent that provides real-time weather data, forecasts, and climate analysis. Inspired by the Kagenti operator demo.

skills.name: Get Current Weather
skills.description: Retrieves current weather conditions for a specified location
examples: What's the weather in San Francisco?
Is it raining in London right now?

parameters.name: units
parameters.description: Temperature units: celsius, fahrenheit, or kelvin

skills.name: Get Weather Forecast
skills.description: Provides weather forecast for the next 7 days
examples: What's the forecast for New York this week?
Will it rain in Paris tomorrow?

skills.name: Weather Alerts
skills.description: Get active weather alerts and warnings for a region
examples: Are there any weather alerts in Florida?
Storm warnings for the Bay Area

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region or state for alert lookup
